title: Add some lint-like coding style warnings

features.name: case statement without default branch
features.description: Code should include a case statement with explicit value choices but no default branch to handle unspecified values

features.name: unused variable declaration
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration that is never used in the design

features.name: multiple assignments to same signal in single always block
features.description: Code should include multiple non-blocking assignments to the same signal within a single always block
